title: pelargonium × laxiflorum
intro: Pelargonium × laxiflorum, also known as Rose-scented Pelargonium, is a hybrid species of pelargonium plant, belonging to the geranium family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the form of tea, which is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness the therapeutic benefits of Pelargonium × laxiflorum.
